text.title: Local Cross-Encoders and Production Patterns
text.summary: Local cross-encoder usage, model selection guide, LangChain integration, and critical pitfalls for production reranking pipelines.

rule.statement: Require GPU for cross-encoder production throughput; CPU inference on MiniLM-L6 is ~30ms/pair, which becomes 1500ms for 50 candidates.
rule.rationale: Cross-encoders score each query-document pair independently. 50 pairs at 30ms each exceed typical P99 SLAs on CPU.

example.code:
from sentence_transformers import CrossEncoder import numpy as np
model = CrossEncoder("cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-12-v2")
def cross_encoder_rerank(query: str, documents: list[str], top_k: int = 5) -> list[dict]: pairs = [[query, doc] for doc in documents] scores = model.predict(pairs, batch_size=32) top_idx = np.argsort(scores)[::-1][:top_k] return [{"document": documents[i], "score": float(scores[i]), "index": i} for i in top_idx]

list.item: cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2: local, small, 20-50ms GPU, good quality
cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-12-v2: local, medium, 40-100ms GPU, better quality
cross-encoder/ms-marco-electra-base: local, large, 80-200ms GPU, best local quality

example.code:
from langchain.retrievers import ContextualCompressionRetriever from langchain.retrievers.document_compressors import CohereRerank
base_retriever = vector_store.as_retriever(search_kwargs={"k": 50}) compressor = CohereRerank(cohere_api_key="your-key", model="rerank-english-v3.0", top_n=5) compression_retriever = ContextualCompressionRetriever(base_compressor=compressor, base_retriever=base_retriever) docs = compression_retriever.get_relevant_documents("What is the capital of France?")

antipattern.description: Comparing relevance scores across different reranking providers (e.g., Cohere 0.9 vs local cross-encoder 0.9).
antipattern.reason: Reranker output scores are not calibrated probabilities. The same numeric value from two providers carries different semantics. Use rankings, not absolute scores, for cross-provider comparisons.

antipattern.description: Relying on reranking to surface a document not retrieved in the first stage.
antipattern.reason: Rerankers only re-order the candidate set returned by ANN. If the relevant document is not in the top-50 candidates, reranking cannot surface it.

section.title: Template Reference
section.reference: RerankerService with cross-encoder + Cohere dispatch, fallback, and FastAPI endpoint
